title: The Great Lakes Handmade Bicycle Show is This Sunday!
content:
The 6th edition of the Great Lakes Handmade Bicycle Show (formally known as The Ann Arbor Handmade Bicycle Show) is happening on Sunday, May 31st, 2026. Please join the crew at its new host shop, Aberdeen Bike in Chelsea, Michigan to see the best builders and makers from the region.

As always, the show is free for both attendees and exhibitors.

See more at Aberdeen Bike‘s website!

The post The Great Lakes Handmade Bicycle Show is This Sunday! appeared first on The Radavist.
author: John Watson
